expo.name: Street Shield - Personal Safety & Awareness
expo.description: Street Shield is your AI-powered personal safety awareness companion for walking, running, cycling, and travelling. Features include: quick alert notifications to trusted contacts, live location sharing, voice-activated safety commands, real-time AI awareness scoring, electric scooter proximity warnings, cycling safety mode, activity insights, multi-language support, and offline safety mode. Designed for pedestrians, runners, students, families, and anyone who wants to stay aware and connected. Trusted across the UK and worldwide. Whether you feel uneasy walking home at night, want to share your live location while jogging, or need discreet alerts for uncertain situations — Street Shield keeps you informed and connected.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Street Shield uses your location to provide safety awareness scores, share it with trusted contacts, and detect nearby environmental factors.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Street Shield uses the microphone for voice-activated commands and the 'Street Shield' trigger word for hands-free use.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Street Shield monitors motion sensors to detect activity changes, track steps, and enhance safety awareness insights.

web.name: Street Shield - Personal Safety Awareness App
web.description: AI-powered personal safety awareness app with quick alerts, live location sharing & real-time threat awareness. Stay informed walking, running or cycling.
